title: solidago virgaurea subsp. alpestris
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. alpestris, also known as the Alpine goldenrod, is a subspecies of the Solidago virgaurea plant, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Solidago virgaurea subsp. alpestris are said to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
